failed_checks: work_6 verification_steps: Run twice / Compare outputs
failure_details.message: Confirmed deterministic regression: final_video hashes match across two identical runs, but pipeline_report.json hashes differ. The required fix is in src/** (timing/report generation), but current work_6 allowed_paths only permit tests/** and runtime/**, so the implementation fix is out of scope for this coder execution.

run_commands:
cd projects/pipeline-runner && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const crypto=require('crypto');const {runPipeline}=require('./src/runner/run-pipeline');const root=fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(),'pr-e2e-'));const video=path.join(root,'input.bin');fs.writeFileSync(video,Buffer.from([9,8,7,6,5]));const hash=p=>crypto.createHash('sha256').update(fs.readFileSync(p)).digest('hex');const stages=()=>[{id:'ingest',run:(ctx)=>{const p=ctx.paths.artifacts;fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(p.video_reference),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.video_reference,JSON.stringify({video_path:ctx.videoPath}));fs.writeFileSync(p.timeline,JSON.stringify({end:1,segments:[{start:0,end:1}]}));fs.writeFileSync(p.audio,'audio-src');return {ok:true};}},{id:'transcript',run:(ctx)=>{const p=ctx.paths.artifacts;fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(p.translated_transcript),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.translated_transcript,JSON.stringify({segments:[{id:1,text:'x'}]}));return {ok:true};}},{id:'dubbing',run:(ctx)=>{const p=ctx.paths.artifacts;fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(p.dubbed_audio),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.dubbed_audio,'dubbed-audio');return {ok:true};}},{id:'subtitle',run:(ctx)=>{const p=ctx.paths.artifacts;fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(p.subtitle),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.subtitle,'1
00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000
hello
');return {ok:true};}},{id:'final',run:(ctx)=>{const p=ctx.paths.artifacts;fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(p.final_video),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.final_video,'final-video-deterministic');return {ok:true};}}];const out1=path.join(root,'run1');const out2=path.join(root,'run2');const r1=runPipeline({videoPath:video,outputDir:out1,stages:stages(),pipelineReportPath:path.join(out1,'pipeline_report.json')});const r2=runPipeline({videoPath:video,outputDir:out2,stages:stages(),pipelineReportPath:path.join(out2,'pipeline_report.json')});if(!r1.ok||!r2.ok){console.error('pipeline_failed');process.exit(2);}const h={report1:hash(path.join(out1,'pipeline_report.json')),report2:hash(path.join(out2,'pipeline_report.json')),final1:hash(path.join(out1,'stages','final','final_video.mp4')),final2:hash(path.join(out2,'stages','final','final_video.mp4'))};if(h.report1!==h.report2||h.final1!==h.final2){console.error('nondeterministic',h);process.exit(4);}console.log('ok',JSON.stringify(h));"
summary: Work_6 e2e determinism failure reproduced in this run: pipeline_report.json changes across identical runs while final_video remains deterministic. The concrete implementation fix requires edits under src/**, but this work item only allows tests/** and runtime/**, so completion is blocked by scope.
